title: Weak Authentication Bypass
description: Due to the lack of information regarding authentication mechanisms, the system may be vulnerable to attackers impersonating legitimate users. Without strong authentication (e.g., multi-factor authentication, robust password policies), attackers could gain unauthorized access.
attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication logic, brute-force attacks against weak passwords, or credential stuffing attacks using leaked credentials from other systems.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Regularly audit authentication logs for suspicious activity and implement intrusion detection systems.
